title: Avan Beruss
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Avan}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Avanberuss.jpg]] |name=Avan Beruss |homeworld=[[Illodia]][[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=[[Clan Beruss]] |parents=[[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|Doman Beruss]] |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Illodian Officers' Academy]][[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Avan Beruss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the early days of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Your father was an Imperial Senator and a friend of Bail Organa, wasn't he?"
"Yes, sir. I wanted to join the rebellion with Leia, but my father had other ideas.|[[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and Beruss, the former reviewing Beruss's history|}} The son of [[Illodia]]n [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|Doman Beruss]] and great nephew of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] Senator [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Avan Beruss was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] into the privilege of a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] [[Clan Beruss|family]], befriending other similarly blessed [[Youngling/Legends|children]] like [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. [[File:Avan.jpg|thumb|left|165px|Avan on Ciutric IV]] During his time at the [[Illodian Officers' Academy]], Beruss developed skills as a [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Sniper/Legends|sharpshooter]]. After graduating with honors, Beruss was slated to represent Illodia in the [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] [[Imperial Games]] as a sharpshooter, until they were cancelled due to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]]. While his [[Parent/Legends|father]] encouraged Beruss to join the Illodian defense force, he instead chose to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], ignoring his father's fears of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] reprisal against his homeworld. Beruss was offered a position in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] shortly before the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]], c. [[4 ABY/Legends|4.75 ABY]], despite having only completed two combat missions prior. During his tenure with the Rogues, he served as [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel's]] [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]] and fell in love with fellow pilot [[Feylis Ardele]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Avan Beruss}} *{{Tales|11|The Princess Leia Diaries}} *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] {{1st}} *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 22|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 22]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 23|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 23]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 24|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{Flash}} *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 26|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 26]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 28|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 28]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 29|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 29]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 30|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 30]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] *''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']] *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{InsiderCite|59|Who's Who in Rogue Squadron}} *{{FactFile|14|ROG 1-2|X-Wing Rogue Squadron}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile|130|RIT 5-6|Galactic Rituals}} {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Rogue Eight/Legends|Rogue Eight]] |years=[[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]] |before=Eventually [[Vekozev Kabir]] |before-years= |after=[[Erisi Dlarit]] |after-years= }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Beruss, Avan}} [[Category:Athletes]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Rogue Squadron personnel]] [[Category:Sharpshooters and snipers]]
